onboarding.title: TikTok Analytics
onboarding.subtitle: Pull profile stats, videos, and hashtag activity from public TikTok
onboarding.sampleDataDescription: No sample data — this template scrapes live TikTok data via the Apify API.

steps.title: Add your Apify Token
steps.description: Sign up at apify.com and paste your token from console.apify.com/account/integrations.

steps.title: Run an Operation
steps.description: Pull profile stats, recent videos, or hashtag activity from any public TikTok account.

steps.title: Browse Results
steps.description: Every run is saved to history.

reference.overview: Wraps the clockworks/free-tiktok-scraper actor to pull public TikTok data. Read-only.

concepts.name: Profile
concepts.description: Public account stats — followers, following, video count, heart count.

concepts.name: Videos
concepts.description: Recent videos with caption, play/digg/comment counts, and music.

concepts.name: Hashtag
concepts.description: Recent videos under a given hashtag with author info.

prompts: Show me the last 10 videos from @khaby.lame
Compare follower counts for charlidamelio, addisonre
tips: Each Apify run costs you compute on apify.com — keep videosLimit small while testing.
Private accounts return no data; the actor only reads public videos.
Your APIFY_TOKEN unlocks the same actors across all four apify-* templates.
